title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial demonstrating a multi-agent AI travel planning system built with LangGraph, featuring four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, and response) that integrate Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL memory, and external APIs for real-time data fetching.
